subject: Your Uber ride receipt
body:
Thanks for riding with Uber!

Uber receipt: $23.75 for trip on March 10

Trip details:
  Pickup: 123 Main St, Downtown
  Dropoff: 456 Tech Park Blvd
  Distance: 8.2 miles
  Duration: 22 min

Fare breakdown:
  Base fare: $3.50
  Distance: $12.30
  Time: $5.95
  Service fee: $2.00
  Total: $23.75

Charged to corporate card ending in 4832.
